title: TikTok User Posts Scraper
description: Extract public TikTok posts by username, profile URL, or numeric user ID.

profile.title: TikTok Profile
profile.description: TikTok username with or without @, full HTTPS TikTok profile URL, or numeric user ID up to 30 digits. Bare numeric values are treated as user IDs; prefix numeric usernames with @.

count.title: Posts Per Page
count.description: Number of posts to return from this page. Scrappa accepts 1-50.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous run. Leave empty for the first page.
